inputs.label: Current Market Price
inputs.businessContext: The current market price of the card in mint condition.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current market price of the card in mint condition.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kartın mükemmel durumdaki güncel piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der aktuelle Marktpreis der Karte in neuwertigem Zustand.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du marché de la carte en état neuf.
businessContext_i18n.es: El precio actual de mercado de la tarjeta en estado impecable.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر السوق الحالي للبطاقة في حالة ممتازة.

inputs.label: Condition Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor based on card condition (1.0 = Mint, 0.5 = Good, 0.1 = Poor).

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor based on card condition (1.0 = Mint, 0.5 = Good, 0.1 = Poor).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kartın durumuna bağlı faktör (1.0 = Mükemmel, 0.5 = İyi, 0.1 = Kötü).
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor basierend auf dem Kartenzustand (1,0 = Neuwertig, 0,5 = Gut, 0,1 = Schlecht).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur basé sur l'état de la carte (1,0 = Neuf, 0,5 = Bon, 0,1 = Mauvais).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor basado en la condición de la tarjeta (1.0 = Impecable, 0.5 = Buena, 0.1 = Mala).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل يعتمد على حالة البطاقة (1.0 = ممتازة، 0.5 = جيدة، 0.1 = سيئة).

inputs.label: Rarity Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for rare or first edition cards (e.g., 2.0 for double value).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for rare or first edition cards (e.g., 2.0 for double value).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nadir veya ilk baskı kartlar için çarpan (örneğin, çift değer için 2.0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für seltene oder Erstauflage-Karten (z. B. 2,0 für doppelten Wert).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour les cartes rares ou de première édition (par exemple, 2,0 pour une valeur double).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para tarjetas raras o de primera edición (ej. 2.0 para valor doble).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف للبطاقات النادرة أو الإصدار الأول (مثل 2.0 للقيمة المزدوجة).

inputs.label: Grading Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost to get the card professionally graded.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to get the card professionally graded.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für die professionelle Gradierung der Karte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût pour faire certifier la carte par un professionnel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de obtener una clasificación profesional de la tarjeta.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الحصول على تقييم احترافي للبطاقة.

inputs.label: Selling Fee (%)
inputs.businessContext: Platform or marketplace selling fee as a percentage of selling price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Platform or marketplace selling fee as a percentage of selling price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Platform veya pazar yeri satış ücreti, satış fiyatının yüzdesi olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verkaufsgebühr der Plattform oder des Marktplatzes als Prozentsatz des Verkaufspreises.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de la plateforme ou du marché de vente en pourcentage du prix de vente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión de venta de la plataforma o mercado como porcentaje del precio de venta.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم المنصة أو السوق كنسبة مئوية من سعر البيع.

inputs.label: Shipping Cost
inputs.businessContext: Shipping cost to safely deliver the card to buyer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shipping cost to safely deliver the card to buyer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kartı alıcıya güvenli bir şekilde teslim etme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Versandkosten für den sicheren Versand der Karte an den Käufer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais d'expédition pour livrer la carte en toute sécurité à l'acheteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de envío para entregar la tarjeta de forma segura al comprador.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الشحن لتوصيل البطاقة بأمان إلى المشتري.

inputs.label: Acquisition Cost
inputs.businessContext: Original cost to acquire the card (purchase price, trade value).

businessContext_i18n.en: Original cost to acquire the card (purchase price, trade value).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kartı edinme orijinal maliyeti (satın alma fiyatı, takas değeri).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'acquisition initial de la carte (prix d'achat, valeur d'échange).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste original de adquisición de la tarjeta (precio de compra, valor de intercambio).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الأصلية لاقتناء البطاقة (سعر الشراء، قيمة المقايضة).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
